Info

Defines GenVhostCommand class implementing ICLICommand strategy.

class gen_vhost.infrastructure.gen_vhost_command.GenVHostCommand[source]¶

Bases: ICLICommand

CLI subcommand for generating virtual host files.

It defines:

attributes:

None.

methods:
name - Returns the command name key.
help_text - Returns the command help text.
options - Returns the command options.
execute - Executes the configuration file generation logic.
__str__ - Returns GenVHostCommand instance as string representation.
_abc_impl = <_abc._abc_data object>¶
execute(params: dict[str, Any], service: IFileGen) → dict[str, Any][source]¶

Executes the configuration file generation logic.

Parameters:

  • params (<dict[str, Any]>) – Subcommand parameters from CLI parser.

  • service (<IFileGen>) – Generation orchestrator service instance.

Returns:

Return code, stdout and stderr messages.

Return type:

<dict[str, Any]>

Exceptions:

None.
